race.comment: GUY'S LAST PRIZE (9) improving gelding who was snagged back from the wide gate and launched late with a slashing Maiden victory over 1425m at this track. Can go on with it now and expect to see him settle much closer here from the inside gate. Top-three contender. PERUNO (7) tough gelding who shows his best over this track and trip. Will relish the fast tempo here and look for him savaging the line with Quince's claim. EXCEED SUCCESS (8) deep into the campaign and has gone to a new level this time in. Will go back from the gate and no shock to see him in the finish. ALAMAGAN (2) tongue-tie goes on after disappointing in his two runs back on the provincial circuit. Ready for the extra trip and will need a bit of luck from the sticky gate. The chances don't end there.
